metadata.title: People Are People (Different Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:14.95] People are people, so why should it be
[01:18.90] You and I should get along so awfully?
[01:22.82] People are people, so why should it be
[01:26.98] You and I should get along so awfully?
[01:32.25] 
[01:36.23] So we're different colours and we're different creeds
[01:40.68] And different people have different needs
[01:44.45] It's obvious. you hate me, though I've done nothing wrong
[01:48.53] I've never even met you, so what could I have done?
[01:53.07] I can't understand
[01:55.17] What makes a man
[01:57.25] Hate another man
[02:02.46] (Help me understand)
[02:04.58] 
[02:08.46] (Help me understand) help me understand
[02:16.45] (Help me understand)
[02:26.52] 
[03:06.76] Shouting at me
[03:10.72] Decency

[03:18.83] Head to your fists

[03:45.18] 
[03:53.87] Now you're punching, and you're kicking, and you're shouting at me
[03:58.42] I'm relying on your common decency
[04:02.23] So far, it hasn't surfaced but I'm sure it exists
[04:05.92] It just takes a while to travel from your head to your fist (head to your fist)
